category.scope_note: Filtering respirators and face masks, comparing Chinese domestic baseline standards against UAE requirements under UAE.S, ESMA/ECAS, and PPE category control.

title.en: China-to-UAE PPE Respirator and Mask Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国过滤式呼吸器进入阿联酋：合规差距对照
title.zht: 中國過濾式呼吸器進入阿聯酋：合規差距對照

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese respirator documentation against UAE respiratory PPE rules, including ESMA/ECAS conformity, UAE.S GSO EN 149 class requirements, in-country market flow, and labeling expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国口罩呼吸器文件与阿联酋呼吸防护要求对照，涵盖ESMA/ECAS合格认证、UAE.S GSO EN 149等级要求、国内流通路径与标签要求。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國口罩呼吸器文件與阿聯酋呼吸防護要求對照，涵蓋ESMA/ECAS合格認證、UAE.S GSO EN 149等級要求、國內流通路徑與標籤要求。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs ruling, or regulatory enforcement action. Exporters and importers should verify current UAE market instructions from the competent authority, ECAS services, product safety rules, and trade documentation requirements before shipment and resale.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或监管执法决定。中国出口商与阿联酋进口商应在出货和销售前核验主管部门、ECAS服务、产品安全规则与贸易文件要求是否仍然有效。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或監管執法決定。中國出口商與阿聯酋進口商應在出貨和銷售前核驗主管部門、ECAS服務、產品安全規則與貿易文件要求是否仍然有效。

answer_first.en: For UAE entry, Chinese export files usually do not bridge to UAE market placement by themselves. The decisive blockers are ECAS or equivalent ESMA route for regulated PPE, valid UAE distributor or in-country entity setup, and product-level claims that must align with UAE.S GSO EN 149 classing and Arabic-capable labeling. CNGB-based technical reports are useful as baseline evidence, but they are not a replacement for UAE conformity administration.
answer_first.zh: 对于阿联酋通关，单靠中国导出的文件通常不足以直接满足市场准入，核心阻点是受控呼吸器的ESMA/ECAS合规路径、阿联酋本地进出口实体配套，以及声明与UAE.S GSO EN 149等级一致并完成阿拉伯语信息披露。CNGB标准报告可作为技术底稿支持，但不能替代阿联酋认证流程。
answer_first.zht: 對於阿聯酋通關，僅靠中國出口文件通常不足以直接滿足市場准入，核心阻礙是受控呼吸器的ESMA/ECAS合規路徑、阿聯酋本地進出口實體配套，以及聲明與UAE.S GSO EN 149等級一致並完成阿拉伯語信息披露。CNGB標準報告可作技術底稿支持，但不能取代阿聯酋認證流程。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Update rows when UAE Ministry/ESMA service paths, UAE.S listed respiratory standards, or MoIAT implementation guidance changes. Keep source URL, accessed date, and verified flag current.
